title: RG Quality of life
description: Adds useful features, improves the interface and makes the game prettier without losing optimization, while keeping the vanilla style.
body:
🔷**A QoL modpack designed for people who want to play on a private server, locally with friends or singleplayer.**


_🔹This modpack isn't suited for large mini game servers, because it adds things that aren't available to use in such servers. However, this modpack is a must-have in regular minecraft gaming, like sorting, mouse tweaks, clicking through signs and frames, cooler rain, etc. It also adds smoothness to GUI's, which makes the game a lot prettier without losing on optimisation. One should download this pack if you want to get an enhancement to the game, while keeping it vanilla._
